message:
feat(explorer): parse streaming responses and improve turn display

- Add ParseStreamingResponse() to reconstruct content from SSE chunks
  (handles text_delta, thinking_delta, input_json_delta events)
- Parse chunks field from log entries for streaming responses
- Match request/response by request_id with fallback to seq for old logs
- Show all user text blocks, not just the first one
- Display previous assistant messages in collapsible sections
- Add timestamps to user and assistant messages
- Sort turns chronologically by request timestamp

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
